particulars.description: Freehold property k/a unit 1 astley way astley lane swillington leeds title no WYK475138.

F/H property k/a sites 6,6A and 7 astley lane industrial estate t/no WYK568154 together with all buildings & fixtures (including trade fixtures). Fixed plant & machinery by way of fixed charge, all present & future book & other debts, floating charge over all moveable plant machinery, implements, utensils, furniture & equipment by way of assignment. The goodwill of the business (if any), the full benefit of all licences & guarantees.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
